KEY: D minor | METER: 4/4 | TEMPO: 97 | GRID: 64th (adaptive) | BARS: 38
VOICES: MIDI[prog=24], MIDI#2[prog=87], MIDI#3[prog=32], MIDI#4[prog=37], MIDI#5[prog=58], MIDI#6[drums]
@1 [D7 | Dm] (grid:24t)
  MIDI#3: D1@1>1^104 C2@5>1^104 D2@10>1^104 D2@15>1^104 E1@16>2^104 F1@19>2^104 Gb1@22>1^80
